channel.title: ubuntu on Ahmad Jamali
channel.description: Recent content in ubuntu on Ahmad Jamali

item.title: Mount the Shared Folders From Synology on Your Ubuntu 18.04 LTS Server
item.description: Have you ever wondered how you can share your folders on your Synology with your linux server for extra storage? Well, I have a Plex server at home and I wanted to rebuild this server from scratch but had no where to put my media. I decided to connect my Synology NAS to my Plex server and use it as a temporary storage. In this guide, I will show you how I managed to do this and how you can achieve the same result.

item.title: Postfix Monitoring With Mailgraph on Ubuntu 18.04 Lts
item.description: If you have a postfix mail relay server, like I do, or a postfix mail server, you want to monitor it with Mailgraph. Mailgraph generates daily, weekly, monthly, and yearly graphs of sent, received, bounched, and rejected emails. This is a very simple install and I’ll describe how to install and configure Mailgraph on Ubuntu 18.04 LTS. 1. Before you begin In this tutorial, my VM has the IP address 192.
